input.request: Fetch RSS from TechCrunch and count items

result.description: Successfully fetched RSS feed from TechCrunch and counted the items.

output.reasoning: The user wants to fetch an RSS feed from a specific source (TechCrunch) and then count the number of items retrieved. The `rss.fetch` tool is the appropriate atomic tool for fetching the feed. After fetching, the system implicitly counts the items available in the returned data structure to fulfill the 'count items' part of the request. I will call `rss.fetch` with the TechCrunch URL.
